name: storage-bucket
title: Cloud Storage bucket
whenToUse: Only when the code actually reads/writes object storage (e.g. uploads, generated assets, function source zips). Detect from storage SDK imports / file-upload features. Do NOT add speculatively.
security: uniform_bucket_level_access + public_access_prevention=enforced are mandatory defaults. Grant the runtime SA access via object_writer_service_accounts (write-only) or object_admin_service_accounts (resource-scoped) — do NOT grant project-wide storage roles via the iam module.
